claim.observation: fls of NTFS inode 92258 (Users/vibranium/AppData/Local/Temp/_MEI65402) lists python27.dll, pywintypes27.dll, win32api.pyd, _socket.pyd, _ssl.pyd, _hashlib.pyd, select.pyd, unicodedata.pyd, bz2.pyd, msvcr90.dll and a shell.exe.manifest.
claim.interpretation: _MEI65402 is the runtime self-extraction directory of a PyInstaller 'onefile' executable: the _MEI<digits> naming convention plus a bundled CPython 2.7 runtime (python27.dll) and its dependency .pyd/.dll modules are produced only when such a packaged executable is run. The bundle includes networking and TLS modules (_socket.pyd, _ssl.pyd, _hashlib.pyd) and Windows API access (win32api.pyd, pywintypes27.dll), and the embedded application manifest identifies the original program as 'shell' (shell.exe.manifest). This indicates a packaged Python remote-shell/agent was extracted and run under the vibranium profile. The directory does not by itself reveal the C2 address or the shell's exact capabilities.
